title: AMAGIC 12 Pack Battery Operated Flameless LED Tea Lights Candles Electric Fake Tealight for Votive, Christmas, Home Decor, Wedding, Table Decor
features: Includes: 12 pack battery candles (pre-installed), instructions; to change the batteries you need to unscrew the switch at the bottom, please note that the flameless tealight do not work with only 1 AG battery, each candle needs 2 AG batteries to work.

Suitable for Tea Light Holders: 1.41 inch wide x 1.37 inch high battery operated tealight candles (batteries included) can be a perfect replacement for traditional tealight in your home, avoiding the fire hazards of traditional candles, no need to worry about the tealights being blown out by the wind.

100 HOURS LED TEALIGHTS: Battery tealights last up to 20 times longer than traditional tealights, and you can replace the batteries in your flameless candles tealight by opening the battery cover on the bottom.The AG10 button cell batteries are small and should be kept away from children and pets to avoid swallowing them.

ADD AMBIENCE: Warm white LED elecreic bright tealight can better simulate real tealight candles, these battery flameless tealight can be placed on the dining table or in the room for a cosy atmosphere, electric tealight can also be used as decorations for weddings, marriage proposals, Halloween, Christmas, vovite, valentine's day, holidays or important occasions.

MULTIPLE SETS AVAILABLE: Flameless Battery Tea Candles are now available in 12/24/50/100 sets in different quantities, so you can choose the one that suits you best according to your preference and needs.
description: Product Description Is the battery pre-installed? Yes, each flameless tealights comes with 2 AG batteries pre-installed, please note that needs 2 AG batteries to work. Does this fake tealight feature a flickering effect? A timer function? No, this model operates in a constant-on mode, with no irritating flickering whatsoever. Is it possible to use it with a tea light holder? Yes, this candle measures 1.41 inches at its widest point and 1.37 inches in height. Please ensure any saucer purchased has an internal diameter larger than these dimensions to prevent an ill-fitting placement. Is it possible to replace the battery? Is the battery compartment difficult to open? Yes, the battery is replaceable, but opening the base requires a certain degree of skill. Please read the accompanying instructions thoroughly before proceeding with the replacement. Why does the bottom switch exhibit a stuttering effect? Is the switch not operating smoothly? Some bottom switches may exhibit slight hesitation upon initial activation. This feature is designed to prevent accidental activation and will not affect the candle's normal operation.
